signals.market_title: Will the official trailer for Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse be released Worldwide before Apr 1, 2026?

model_predictions.reasoning: Bull case: market at 0.09, sentiment is neutral (90% conf). Adjusting up by 17% for bull thesis.

The film's indefinite delay and absence of a new, firm release date are significant obstacles. Studios typically release official trailers as part of a marketing push for a known release window; doing so without one risks premature hype and audience fatigue. Given past production challenges and the current uncertain status, an early 2026 trailer seems unlikely to be strategically viable.
Risk view: market at 0.09 is the best prior. Gap of +41.0% is suspicious. Adjusted +0.055 from market anchor.
